description: Pre-CI AI authoring checklist for HorrorPlace-Spectral-Foundry. Ensures spectral entities, style contracts, and metrics bindings are schema-bound, implication-only, and correctly placed.

global_rules.description: Each authoring request must propose exactly one primary file plus optional registry edits.
global_rules.ai_action: Negotiate a sequence for multiple artifacts; do not return unrelated files at once.

global_rules.description: Spectral contracts must be implication-first. No narrative prose or explicit descriptions.
global_rules.ai_action: Use IDs, invariant bindings, and metric ranges instead of descriptive text.

global_rules.description: Spectral Foundry defines contracts, not runtime behavior.
global_rules.ai_action: Scripts may only validate schemas or compute hashes; no engine logic or direct game loops.

invariant_binding_rules.description: Must map specific invariants to style behaviors (e.g., fog density, audio distortion).
invariant_binding_rules.ai_action: Ensure all invariant values fall within [0.0, 1.0] except DET [0, 10].

metric_target_rules.description: Must define target ranges for UEC, EMD, STCI, CDL, ARR.

adapter_rules.description: Must specify engine adapters (e.g., godot-2d, unreal-fps) by ID only.

threshold_rules.description: Entity activation must be gated by invariant thresholds.
threshold_rules.ai_action: Define clear min/max ranges for CIC, SPR, etc.

ai_actions: Path must use git@ URI for vault references.
Hash must be SHA-256 of the canonicalized contract.
Update registry only after the contract file is valid.
